case_title: PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. EDRIC KILIMANN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KILIMANN, EDRIC , AN INDIVIDUAL DOING BUSINESS AS MONSTERCLEANERS.COM DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-12-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-27-2007
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-04-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-04-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-12-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2007 CONTINUED TO JAN-07-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). (FILING OF DISMISSAL PENDING). NOV-26-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-07-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
